# Mohammed Khizer Shaikh — Portfolio

> Mohammed Khizer Shaikh is a Full-Stack Web Developer and AI/ML engineer based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.
> He specializes in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, Django, and MongoDB.
> Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science at SVGU.

## About

Mohammed Khizer Shaikh (also known as MK) is a passionate Full-Stack Web Developer and AI/ML enthusiast.
He builds highly performant, user-centric web applications that bridge complex algorithms with intuitive design.
He has completed a Diploma in AI/ML from LJ University and has professional experience as a Python Developer Intern at Way to Web, where he worked on the Tripboss project using Django.

## Technical Skills

### Frontend Development
React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS

### Backend Development
Python, Django, Node.js, REST APIs, Express.js

### Databases
MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL

### AI / Machine Learning
Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Python AI/ML libraries, scikit-learn

### Programming Languages
Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, C, C++

### Tools & Systems
Git, GitHub, Linux, VS Code, Netlify, Vercel, Sentry

## Education

- Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) in Computer Science — Sumandeep Vidyapeeth General University (SVGU), Ahmedabad (3rd Year, In Progress)
- Diploma in AI/ML — LJ University, Ahmedabad (Completed)

## Professional Experience

- Python Developer Intern — Way to Web, Ahmedabad
  - Worked on the Tripboss travel platform using Django
  - Built REST API endpoints and database integrations
  - Tech stack: Python, Django, MongoDB

Mohammed Khizer has built projects in the following domains:
- Full-stack web applications using React and Next.js
- AI-powered assistants and chatbots
- Django REST API backends
- Event management platforms
- Portfolio and personal branding websites
